---
title: "Section 2: Data and Media Pages"
id: "mod001-se01-sec02"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec02"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---




### In this section
<br>

- [Data Page](mod001-se01-sec02-sp01.qmd)

- [Video Page](mod001-se01-sec02-sp02.qmd)

- [Text Page](mod001-se01-sec02-sp03.qmd)

- [Methods Page](mod001-se01-sec02-sp04.qmd)

- [Case Study](mod001-se01-sec02-sp05.qmd)

- [Discussion Page](mod001-se01-sec02-sp06.qmd)

- [Summary Page](mod001-se01-sec02-sp07.qmd)

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="../01-core-learning-pages/mod001-se01-sec01-sp07.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Summary Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec02-sp01.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Data Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
